title: Floating Elements

statement.markdown:
description: Create a webpage that displays a floating text element over an image background. The text element should animate into view when the page loads and should move around the screen slowly.
requirements
1. Create an HTML structure that includes an image element and a floating text element.
2. Style the page with Tailwind CSS classes to create a visually appealing design.
3. Use JavaScript to animate the floating text element into view when the page loads.
4. Add a smooth animation to the floating text element that moves it around the screen slowly.

constraints: The webpage should load within 5 seconds on a standard laptop.
The code should follow standard web development best practices and be free of errors.
The animation should be smooth and not cause any usability issues.

gradingCriteria.description: The webpage has a visually appealing design with good use of Tailwind CSS classes.
The floating text element animates into view when the page loads and moves around the screen smoothly.
The webpage loads within 5 seconds on a standard laptop.
